title: pycreus longus
intro: Pycreus longus, also known as Papyrus Sedge or Dwarf Papyrus, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the Cyperaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pycreus longus include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and effects.
